title: Italy Car Insurance Prices — Input
description: By default this pulls the latest quarter of RC Auto prices for every Italian province, region and macro-area. Just press Start — or fine-tune below.

mode.title: 📅 What time range?
mode.description: Latest = the most recent quarter (fastest, recommended). Year range = pick specific years. All available = the full history since 2021.

maxPublications.title: How many recent quarters?
maxPublications.description: Only for 'Latest' mode — e.g. 1 = newest quarter, 4 = last year of quarters.

yearFrom.title: From year
yearFrom.description: Start year — used only in 'Specific year range' mode.

yearTo.title: To year
yearTo.description: End year — used only in 'Specific year range' mode.

vehicleTypes.title: 🚗 Vehicle types
vehicleTypes.description: Which vehicles to include. Leave all selected for the complete picture.

includeProvinceData.title: 🗺️ Per-province rows
includeProvinceData.description: The core data: average premium, YoY change, percentiles and contract counts for all 107 provinces.
includeProvinceData.sectionCaption: Territorial levels — choose what to include
includeProvinceData.sectionDescription: Pick which geographic breakdowns you want in the output. All are on by default.

includeRegionalAggregates.title: 🏛️ Regional averages (official, weighted)
includeRegionalAggregates.description: Official IVASS contract-weighted average premium for each of the 20 regions.

includeMacroareaAggregates.title: 🧭 Macro-area averages
includeMacroareaAggregates.description: Weighted averages for Nord-Ovest, Nord-Est, Centro, Sud and Isole.

includeNationalAggregate.title: 🇮🇹 National average
includeNationalAggregate.description: One national contract-weighted average per vehicle type (matches the official IVASS headline figure).

source.title: Data source
source.description: Advanced — leave as IPER. IPER carries the per-province price tables.
enumTitles: IPER — RC Auto prices by province (recommended)
source.sectionDescription: You normally don't need to touch these.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy
proxyConfiguration.description: IVASS is an Italian site — an Italian proxy is recommended and pre-configured.
